servicesSection.headline: Our Plumbing Services
servicesSection.description: From routine repairs to emergency drain cleaning, we handle it all with care and expertise.

processSection.headline: How It Works
processSection.description: Getting your plumbing fixed shouldn't be complicated.

steps.title: Call Us
steps.description: Reach us at (713) 364-3254. We'll ask a few questions to understand your issue and schedule a visit.

steps.title: On-Site Diagnosis
steps.description: Our licensed plumber arrives on time, inspects the problem, and gives you an honest quote before any work starts.

steps.title: Expert Repair
steps.description: We fix it right the first time using quality parts and proven techniques. No shortcuts.

steps.title: Your Approval
steps.description: We walk you through what we did, clean up, and make sure you're satisfied before we leave.

aboutSection.description: Hart Of Texas Plumbing & Drain Cleaning is a family-owned plumbing company serving the greater Houston area. Founded in 2016, we've built our reputation on honest pricing, fast response times, and quality workmanship. Our licensed plumbers handle everything from leaky faucets and clogged drains to full repiping and sewer line repair. We treat every home like our own and every customer like a neighbor.
aboutSection.mission: To provide reliable, affordable plumbing services to Houston families with integrity and respect.

values.title: Honest Pricing
values.description: We quote before we start. No hidden fees, no surprise charges. Ever.

values.title: Fast Response
values.description: Plumbing emergencies don't wait. Neither do we. Same-day service available.

values.title: Quality Work
values.description: Licensed plumbers using quality parts. We fix it right the first time with a warranty.
